column1: This boat is as _____ as that ship. (big)
That is the _____ boat I've ever seen. (big)
The king and the queen lived happily all their _____ . (life)
Have you got any _____ of your family? (photo)
Take the _____ street on the left and the hotel is on the right. (one)
When is your birthday? - My birthday is in May. The _____ of May. (five)
The bike is _____ , but the car is much _____ . (dirty, dirty)
Anton has pen friends in seven different _____ . (country)
Thank you, it's been a _____ evening. I've enjoyed _____ tremendously. (wonderful, I)
